_comment: Tag database: maps each ICCP point the TASE.2 server publishes to a real field-device source. Copy this to tags.json and edit. 'driver' picks the southbound reader (stub | modbus). 'type' float -> WRITEF, int -> WRITEI. 'scale'/'offset' convert raw register units to engineering units (value = raw*scale + offset). For modbus: 'kind' holding|input, 'decode' uint16|int16|uint32|int32|float32, and for 32-bit decodes 'word_order' big (ABCD, default) or little (CDAB) selects the register order; 'count' defaults to what the decode needs.

tags._note: stub: plumbing test only, returns a fixed value, not real data
reads a 32-bit float from two holding registers on a real PLC
breaker status from an input register
